## Research Report: Bill Maher – Mark Twain Prize for American Humor (Kennedy Center, June 28, 2026)

### Data Limitations
All web research tools (WebSearch, WebFetch, and MCP search tools) were unavailable during this research session. The specific question concerns events **after my knowledge cutoff of early 2025**, meaning I cannot provide confirmed, sourced facts on the current status of this event.

### Background: The Mark Twain Prize
- The **Mark Twain Prize for American Humor** is awarded by the **John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts** in Washington, D.C.
- It is one of the most prestigious honors in American comedy.
- Ceremonies are typically held at the Kennedy Center and broadcast on **PBS**.
- Recent recipients include **Adam Sandler (2023)** and **Kevin Hart (2024)**.
